name: Academia
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN109 using the live Academia source repository and public Academia archives dataset. No standalone website, docs site, API, OpenAPI, or SSE surface has been verified yet.

gap_notes: No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.

surfaces.name: Academia source repository
surfaces.notes: Public Academia source repository for SN109.

surfaces.name: Academia Bittensor archives dataset
surfaces.notes: Public Academia archives dataset repository for Bittensor historical subnet/archive data.

surfaces.name: Academia TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/109/ on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN109 on-chain subnet state, SubnetIdentitiesV3 metadata, economics, and dTAO market fields. Academia exposes source repositories and archives but no verified first-party public API endpoint; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API. TaoMarketCap now enforces a trailing slash (the non-slash path 301s); tracked URL updated to the canonical non-redirecting form. Rejects HEAD (405); probe uses GET.
